chapter_title.en: Chapter on Ensuring the Absence of Pregnancy in Bondwomen (istibra)

text: أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا اِشْتَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ جَارِيَةً وَ هِيَ لَمْ تُدْرِكْ أَوْ قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ اَلْحَيْضِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ لاَ يَسْتَبْرِئَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4546 - Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"If a man purchases a bondwoman who has not yet reached maturity or has passed the age of menstruation, then there is no harm if he does not observe an istibra' (waiting period) for her."
